SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFFS DANIEL HOWARD AND J. KELLY HOWARD ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS 1700 CALIFORNIA STREET ASSOCIATES, LP AND GO MOSSER 1700 CALIFORNIA GP, LLC REPRESENTED BY ZACHARY JACOBS, ASSISTANT PROPERTY MANAGER AND DARWIN GARZA, SR. MULTISITE PROPERTY MANAGER ARE PRESENT. THE RELATED CASE CSM-20-863819 DANIEL HOWARD VS. 1700 CALIFORNIA STREET ASSOCIATES, LP ET AL IS HEARD AT THE SAME TIME. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
